title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Disha Publication - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Disha Publication - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Disha Publication invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Disha Publication:
Disha Publication is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Disha Publication!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
